text: UNC to hire ex-NBA coach Michael Malone as HC, sources say - espn.com
fullText: North Carolina intends to hire former longtime NBA coach Michael Malone as the school's next basketball coach, sources told ESPN.

text: WATCH LIVE: NASA's Artemis II crew is flying around the moon today - NPR
fullText: The Artemis II astronauts have broken a record set by NASA's Apollo 13 astronauts. Once they arrive at the moon late Monday, the crew will loop about 4,000 miles from the lunar surface.

text: 'They could spend 4 or 5 hours per day underwater': How humans adapted to the most challenging environments - Live Science

text: Trump Backs Republican Steve Hilton for California Governor - Bloomberg.com
